Z0100B_MDCR_RUG_VRSN_TXT Z0100B_MDCR_RUG_VRSN_TXT Z0100B Medicare Part A RUG Version Text CHAR 10 The data in this column contains the submitted Medicare Part A RUG version code.
630 Z0100C_MDCR_SHRT_STAY_CD Z0100C_MDCR_SHRT_STAY_CD Z0100C Medicare Part A Short Stay Assessment Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether this is a Medicare short stay assessment. 0=No
1=Yes discontinued 9/30/2019
631 Z0150A_MDCR_NTHRPY_HIPPS_TXT Z0150A_MDCR_NTHRPY_HIPPS_TXT Z0150A Medicare Part A
